title: Senior Deep Learning Software Engineer - Autonomous Vehicles
description: Join the NVIDIA Autonomous Vehicles team to build state-of-the-art Deep Learning systems. You will design, develop, and optimize deep neural networks for computer vision, sensor fusion, and trajectory prediction. Requirements include: Strong Python/C++ skills, deep understanding of CNNs/Transformers, CUDA optimization, and hands-on experience with PyTorch.

title: Machine Learning Applications Engineer
description: NVIDIA's Machine Learning Applications group is looking for software engineers to build enterprise-scale generative AI tools. In this role, you will work on optimizing large language models (LLMs) and diffusion models for retail, finance, and medical sectors. You will collaborate with research teams to integrate models into the NVIDIA NIM microservice pipeline.

title: Senior Deep Learning Compiler Engineer
description: We are seeking a senior compiler engineer to lead DL compiler optimizations for next-generation GPU architectures (TensorRT / TVM / MLIR). You will design graph-level compiler passes, automate kernel generation, and accelerate custom neural networks for edge and high-performance computing platforms.

title: Associate Data Engineer (Big Data & Core Analytics)
description: Goldman Sachs' Core Data Engineering group is seeking an associate engineer to design and maintain high-throughput ETL data pipelines. You will build and scale reliable architectures processing millions of trades daily using Spark, Hadoop, Kafka, and AWS cloud storage. Knowledge of Java, Scala, or Python is required.

title: Vice President - Senior Data Scientist & Quantitative Modeler
description: Lead a team of quant scientists in building algorithmic risk assessments and financial forecasting models. We apply advanced statistical modelling, time-series forecasting, and machine learning methods to market indices and credit portfolios. Strong PhD/MS foundation in Quantitative Finance, Mathematics, or Computer Science required.

title: Senior Data Analyst - Corporate & Investment Bank (CIB)
description: JP Morgan Chase is hiring a Senior Data Analyst to lead operational efficiency modeling within the Investment Banking division. You will build data structures using SQL and Snowflake, generate predictive dashboards in Tableau, and write Python scripts to automate regulatory reports.

title: Lead Machine Learning Scientist - AI Research
description: Join JP Morgan's award-winning AI Research Lab in London. You will conduct cutting-edge research in NLP, Reinforcement Learning, and Multi-Agent Systems applied to capital market execution, algorithmic trading, and fraud detection. Candidates are expected to publish in top-tier conferences (NeurIPS, ICML, KDD).
